author: Besting
text: REVISION 2026-06-05 (config/store split, bl-2e26 §15): the three gaps are reframed by the branch-split. (A) 'prime drives sync' survives, folded into the prime/sync rework bl-9329. (B) origin autodiscovery: the transitive landing->origin->central TRAIL is DISSOLVED — no trail; the tracker simply resolves the STORE remote (pointer > origin-of-invocation_path), covered by bl-cd21; drop core origin_of. (C) 'bl sync <ref> pulls a specific repo/branch' SURVIVES as the distinct remaining work here — keep this task scoped to (C), sequence after bl-9329/bl-cd21.
